topic: My coat pockets fill with dark grave dirt and a different key every morning.
title: My Coat Pockets Fill With Grave Dirt | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Every morning my coat pockets are full of dark dirt and a strange key.
scenes.image_prompt: A heavy coat hanging on a hook, dark soil spilling from a pocket onto the floor, dim hallway light, deep shadow, grainy film, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It is the only coat I own, hung by the door.
scenes.image_prompt: A single dark coat on a wall hook by a front door, dim entry, low light, muted color, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I empty those pockets every night.
scenes.image_prompt: Hands turning out an empty coat pocket over a dark floor, lamp glow, long shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The first morning my hand came out filthy and cold.
scenes.image_prompt: A hand pulling dark crumbling soil from a coat pocket, harsh side light, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The dirt smelled of damp earth and rot.
scenes.image_prompt: A pile of dark moist soil on a wooden floor beneath a coat, dim light, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Underneath was an old iron key I did not know.
scenes.image_prompt: An old rusted iron key resting in dark dirt on a floor, dim lamp light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every dawn brought fresh dirt and a different key.
scenes.image_prompt: A row of mismatched old keys laid out on a dark table, dim light, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I took the dirt to a lab to be tested.
scenes.image_prompt: A small bag of dark soil on a cold steel counter, clinical light, shadow, grainy film, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: They said it was grave soil, very old.
scenes.image_prompt: A microscope slide of dark earth in a dim laboratory, cold light, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One key finally fit the gate of the old cemetery.
scenes.image_prompt: An iron key in a rusted cemetery gate lock at dusk, fog, dim grey light, bare trees, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Inside, fresh dirt was heaped on an open empty plot.
scenes.image_prompt: An open empty grave with dark soil piled beside it at dusk, fog, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The headstone there carried my own name.
scenes.image_prompt: A weathered headstone with a faint engraved name in a foggy graveyard, dim grey light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing
